string.text: %c[default] addon has %c[255,255,215,0]COMPLETELY failed to load%c[default]. There are different reasons this could happen. This was the first failure:\n %c[255,255,0,0] \n
Update other Catspaw addons (like Fair Fast Travel, Milspec PDA, or PAW)
Move this addon to the bottom of your load order in MO2
Re-download the addon from Moddb and reinstall it
Launch Anomaly with no other mods, and see if it still happens

%c[default] 
If DotMarks is still failing after that, something is probably %c[255,220,220,220]seriously wrong%c[default] with your Anomaly installation. 
Go to %c[255,255,215,0]MCM %c[default]> %c[255,255,215,0]DotMarks %c[default]> %c[255,255,215,0]Advanced Settings%c[default] and provide a debug log per the instructions there.
